tower_condition_summary: R phase polymer insulator string shows surface tracking and local heating.
observation_note: Drone thermal survey detected concentrated hotspot around clamp connection.
remark: Schedule urgent replacement within seven days.

tower_condition_summary: Localized corrosion on earth wire support bracket and lower steel member.
observation_note: No thermal alarm; issue is primarily material degradation from moisture exposure.
remark: Monitor in next maintenance cycle and apply protective coating.
